name: Baidu Qianfan
steps: Visit Baidu IAM API Key Console
Sign in with your Baidu account
Click "Create API Key" to generate a new key
Paste it above and click "Validate & Save"
notes: All ERNIE models are pay-per-use (CNY). ERNIE-4.5-Turbo is the most cost-effective. Pricing is in CNY per 1K tokens. V2 API is fully OpenAI-compatible.
